subcodes.first_line: The Book that hath been sent down in truth from the heaven of grace unto a people who comprehend. Verily, there is no God but Him, through Whom hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من سماء الفضل لقوم یفقهون انه ما من اله الا هو به انارت
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
